privacy.intro: ReKindle ist eine Webanwendung für E-Ink-Geräte. Der Telegram-Client verwendet die Telegram-MTProto-API über das ReKindle-Backend in Yandex Cloud. Die Autorisierungssitzung jedes Benutzers und eine optionale MTProxy-Konfiguration werden auf dem Server verschlüsselt gespeichert; Anmeldecodes und Passwörter für die zweistufige Verifizierung werden nicht gespeichert. Microsoft To Do verwendet Microsoft Graph mit delegiertem Tasks.ReadWrite-Zugriff; das Refresh-Token wird im ReKindle-Backend verschlüsselt, während Aufgabeninhalte in Microsoft To Do verbleiben.
privacy.section.1.body:
ReKindle arbeitet in zwei Modi:

  • Gastmodus: Alle Daten werden lokal im Local Storage Ihres Browsers gespeichert. Es wird nichts an unsere Server gesendet. Wenn Sie den Browser-Cache leeren, gehen diese Daten verloren.
  • Angemeldeter Modus: Daten für unterstützte Apps werden sicher mit Google Firebase (Firestore & Realtime Database) unter Ihrer eindeutigen Benutzer-ID synchronisiert. Dies ermöglicht Ihnen den Zugriff auf Ihre Daten über mehrere Geräte hinweg.
privacy.section.1.title: 1. Datenarchitektur
privacy.section.2.body:
ReKindle bietet optionale Integrationen mit Google Tasks und Google Kalender.

  • Zugriff: Der Zugriff beginnt erst, nachdem Sie ReKindle ausdrücklich über Google OAuth 2.0 autorisiert haben.
  • Verwendung: Aufgaben und Kalendertermine werden ausschließlich zur Anzeige und Bearbeitung in ReKindle direkt in Ihren Browser geladen.
  • Speicherung: Inhalte aus Google Tasks und Kalender werden nicht auf ReKindle- oder Firebase-Servern gespeichert. Temporäre Zugriffstoken verbleiben für die Sitzung im Local Storage des Browsers.
  • Aufbewahrung und Weitergabe: Lokale Sitzungsdaten werden beim Abmelden oder Löschen des Browser-Cache entfernt. Sie können den Zugriff in den Sicherheitseinstellungen Ihres Google-Kontos widerrufen. ReKindle gibt Google-Benutzerdaten nicht an Dritte weiter.

Die Google APIs Client Library wird nur für OAuth sowie die Tasks-/Kalender-Erkennung verwendet. Es gilt die Google API Services User Data Policy einschließlich der Limited-Use-Anforderungen.
privacy.section.2.title: 2. Google-Benutzerdaten (Tasks und Kalender)
privacy.section.3.body:
Wir setzen branchenübliche Sicherheitsmaßnahmen ein, um die Vertraulichkeit und Integrität Ihrer sensiblen Daten zu gewährleisten.

  • Verschlüsselung bei der Übertragung: Alle Daten, die zwischen Ihrem Gerät, unseren Servern und Drittanbieterdiensten (einschließlich Google APIs) übertragen werden, sind mittels Transport Layer Security (TLS/SSL) verschlüsselt.
  • Verschlüsselung im Ruhezustand: Alle Daten, die mit unserer Datenbank synchronisiert werden (wie in Abschnitt 4 detailliert), werden auf Google Firebase (Firestore & Realtime Database) gehostet, welches Daten im Ruhezustand mit dem 256-Bit Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-256) verschlüsselt.
  • Sicherer Zugriff: Der Zugriff auf persönliche Daten ist auf den authentifizierten Benutzer beschränkt. Wir verwenden sichere Token (OAuth 2.0), um die Autorisierung zu verwalten, ohne Ihr tatsächliches Google-Passwort zu speichern.
privacy.section.3.title: 3. Datenschutzmechanismen
privacy.section.4.body:
If you create a ReKindle account, supported application data is stored in the primary Google Firebase project (rekindle-fork) under your user ID to enable synchronization across devices:

  • Tasks & Quick ToDo: To-do items created in the main Tasks app or generated via handwriting in Quick ToDo.
  • Calendar (Native): Events added to the native calendar if Google Calendar is not enabled.
  • Notes: The text content, formatting, timestamps, and sorting preferences of your notes.
  • Library: Your Reader library index and reading progress. Book files remain in the browser cache (IndexedDB).
  • Settings: General preferences, wallpaper selection, integration toggles, display mode, auto-scaling, font preferences (including OpenDyslexic), unit system, and your custom AI API keys or third-party tokens (stored in owner-only private settings when sync is enabled).
  • Crossword & Mini Crossword: Current puzzle state and grid progress.
  • Sudoku: Current puzzle state and pencil marks.
  • Nonograms (Picross): Puzzle progress and solved states.
  • Minesweeper: Current game state and timer.
  • Nerdle: Daily game state and guesses.
  • Chess & Checkers: Win/Loss/Draw statistics.
  • Leaderboards: High scores for Tetris, Snake, Trivia, Tower of Hanoi, Lights Out, Mario, Dino, Pet, Block Blast, Wordle, Spelling Bee, Perfect Circle, Maze, and Codebreaker are stored publicly linked to your username.
  • Interactive Reader: Your library of saved text adventures and reading progress.
  • Trivia: Your personal game history and statistics.
  • Reddit: Your list of saved subreddits.
  • Flashcards: Your decks, cards, and study intervals.
  • Countdown: Your saved event timers.
  • Spelling Bee: Your daily found words and puzzle statistics.
  • Words (Scrabble): Multiplayer game state and turn history.
  • Freewrite: Active writing sessions and saved documents.
  • AirType: Your saved freewrite notes and writing sessions.
  • Flipbook: Your animations and drawing manifests are synced to enable cross-device editing.
  • Live Multiplayer Games: Active game session state is stored in the Realtime Database for Chess, Checkers, Connect 4, Dots & Boxes, Pictionary, Tic-Tac-Toe, Uno, and Yahtzee.
  • Spellbound: Your puzzle progress and stats.
  • Solitaire: Your saved game state and statistics.
  • Read Later: Your saved articles and reading list.
  • Account Credentials: Your synthetic email address ({username}@rekindle.ink) and hashed password for authentication. You may change your password at any time.
  • Dashboard: Your favorite apps layout and homepage preferences.
  • Weather: Your saved locations and weather display preferences.
  • Chat (AI Assistant): Your AI chat presets and conversation preferences.
  • Pet: Your virtual pet state and progression.
  • Pool: Your single-player billiards game state.
  • Security & Abuse Prevention: Your IP address is securely logged when registering and logging in. This is used strictly to enforce bans against serial offenders and prevent the creation of multiple accounts by abusive users. It is not used for external tracking or advertising.
privacy.section.4.title: 4. Firebase Cloud Sync Daten
privacy.section.5.body:
The following apps store data only on your specific device via browser localStorage (or are purely ephemeral), regardless of login status:

  • Browser: Your browsing history.
  • E-ink Sites: This app is a curated list of links and does not store any user data.
  • Pomodoro Timer: Session settings are ephemeral and not saved.
  • Calculator: No data is stored.
  • Breathing: Session settings are ephemeral.
  • Single Player Games: 2048 (High Score & Game State), Wordle (Daily Progress), Jigsaw, Memory, Solitaire, Connections (Bindings), Word Search, Anagrams, Hangman, Blackjack (Chip Balance), Pool (8-Ball), Codebreaker, Doom, Yahtzee, Oregon Trail, Strands, and Perfect Circle (personal high score).
  • Pass-and-Play Games: Game State for 2-Player Battleship, Chess, Checkers, Connect 4, Tic-Tac-Toe, Texas Hold'em, and Pool is not synced to the cloud.
  • Freewrite: Host/Client connection codes are ephemeral and not stored permanently.
  • Translate: Your recent translation history and target languages.
  • Manga: Your reading progress and bookmarked series.
  • Readwise: Your API token and saved highlights are stored locally.
  • Photo Frame: Display preferences are stored locally. Uploaded photos use authenticated, owner-only Yandex Object Storage paths described in Section 1.
  • Stopwatch: Session state is stored in localStorage as part of the Timer app.
privacy.section.5.title: 5. Nur lokale Daten
privacy.section.6.body:
ReKindle connects to the following third-party public APIs and services to provide functionality:

  • Google Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and other LLMs: Used for the AI Assistant (Chat) intelligence. Your prompts are sent to these services via our secure proxy. Additionally, you may configure direct client-side connections to Groq, xAI (Grok), Mistral, Perplexity, Together AI, Fireworks AI, and local Ollama instances. These direct connections are user-configured and not proxied through our servers.
  • Yandex Cloud: API Gateway and Cloud Functions process authenticated AI, OCR, user storage, billing, Reader, Readwise, Telegram, Microsoft To Do, and game proxy requests. Interactive story files and user uploads use Yandex Object Storage.
  • Gutendex: Used by the Reader app to search for and download public domain ebooks.
  • DictionaryAPI & Wiktionary: Used by the Dictionary app for definitions.
  • Open-Meteo: Used for weather data and alerts.
  • OpenStreetMap & Stadia Maps: Used by the Maps app for tiles, geocoding, and routing.
  • Reddit: Used to fetch public posts and comments.
  • Wikipedia & Wiktionary: Used for encyclopedia articles and dictionary definitions.
  • GitHub: Used as data sources for Crossword and Spelling Bee.
  • Open Trivia Database: Used by the Trivia app for questions.
  • CORS Proxies: Various CORS proxy services are used to fetch content from external sources that don't support cross-origin requests.
  • Stripe: Used to securely process payments for ReKindle+.
  • Beeper Desktop API: Used by the Beeper Connect app to interface directly with your local Beeper instance over your local network.
  • Lingva.ml: Used by the Translate app to process text queries.
  • MangaDex / Comic APIs: Used by the Manga app to fetch public comic chapters.
  • Unsplash / Display APIs: Used by the Photoframe app to display randomized background images.
  • Readwise API: Used to fetch your saved highlights and reading list.
  • IFDB & IFArchive: Used by the Interactive Reader app for interactive fiction catalog and downloads.
  • DuckDuckGo HTML: Used by the Yandex Reader service for article search.
  • NY Times: Used by the Wordle and Strands apps for daily puzzle data.
  • Iconify: Used for icon search and display.
  • QR Server: Used by the AirType app to generate QR codes.
  • Ko-fi: Used to display the donation leaderboard on the Supporters page.
  • IPify: Used to fetch your public IP address for IP ban enforcement checks.
  • Counter.dev: Used for anonymous page-view analytics across the site.

CDN Libraries: We load open-source JavaScript libraries from public CDNs including cdn.jsdelivr.net, cdnjs.cloudflare.com, unpkg.com, and gstatic.com. These libraries include Firebase SDKs, marked.js, chess.js, localForage, JSZip, EPUB.js, Mammoth, docx, FileSaver, QRCode, html5-qrcode, gif.js. These CDNs may log your IP address per their own policies.
privacy.section.6.title: 6. Dienste von Drittanbietern
privacy.section.7.body:
Wenn Sie Fragen zu dieser Richtlinie haben,

Kontakt: contact@ukiyomusic.com
